utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 corresponding items are present. Next, check if each is fully specified with details and costs: 1) health_coverage includes plan name, monthly cost, policy number, and note about meeting statutory requirements; it mentions health but does not explicitly mention mental health, though generally part of health insurance—however the format requires "physical and mental health insurance with costs" explicitly, which is not clearly stated. 2) property_coverage includes plan name, monthly cost, policy number, and what it covers (home/contents is required; the entry covers photography gear up to €3,000 but does not state home/contents explicitly). 3) travel_coverage includes plan name, monthly cost, policy number, and scope (international teaching assignments and expedition photography) which satisfies travel insurance with costs. 4) additional_services lists services, costs, policy numbers, and coverage amounts—meets requirement. 5) total_budget includes monthly and annual totals and breakdown—meets requirement. Therefore, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget are fully specified. Health_coverage is incomplete relative to explicit "physical and mental" requirement; property_coverage is incomplete relative to "home/contents insurance" requirement.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists specific products: LifeFirst Standard Health Plan, InsurePlus Equipment Coverage (which aligns with InsurePlus Standard Coverage under home_content), Adventure Travel Coverage (matches travel_enhancement_services Adventure Travel Coverage), and two liability policies (Professional Liability and International Teaching Liability) which do not appear in the ground-truth ratings and therefore cannot be mapped. Travel coverage named 'Adventure Travel Coverage' is an enhancement item, not one of the travel_insurance plan names; thus we map it to the enhancement with the same name. Health coverage 'LifeFirst Standard Health Plan' maps to 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under primary_health_coverage.physical_health. Property coverage 'InsurePlus Equipment Coverage' maps to 'InsurePlus Standard Coverage' under property_protection.home_content.
